channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.5.5
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.5

  • Speaker Diarization — Identifies different speakers in transcriptions with colored labels (Speaker 1, Speaker 2, etc.)
  • Speaker legend — Color-coded speaker bar shows all detected speakers at a glance
  • Better completion banner — Shows transcription title with "View" button to reopen the transcription window
  • Speaker labels in exports — TXT, SRT, and VTT exports include speaker identification
